title: Brevo vs GetResponse (2025): Which Is Better?
meta_description: Compare Brevo and GetResponse. See pricing, features, ratings, and which email marketing tool wins for your needs.
intro: Brevo and GetResponse are both popular email marketing platforms with free tiers, but they serve different business needs. Brevo excels as an all-in-one CRM with multi-channel capabilities, while GetResponse is built for course creators and webinar hosts. This guide helps you choose the right tool based on your specific requirements.
choose_a_if: You need a robust CRM with multi-channel marketing (SMS, WhatsApp, live chat)
You handle high email volumes and require transactional email API capabilities
You want the largest free tier with up to 100,000 subscribers
choose_b_if: You're an online course creator or run webinars as part of your business
You need conversion funnels and landing page builders integrated
You want the lowest entry price for paid plans at $19/month

faq.a: Brevo is better for general email marketing and multi-channel campaigns, offering superior CRM functionality and a much larger free tier. However, GetResponse is better if you specifically need webinar hosting and online course features. The choice depends on your business model.

faq.q: Which is cheaper, Brevo or GetResponse?
faq.a: GetResponse's paid plans start at $19/month versus Brevo's $25/month, making it cheaper for basic plans. However, Brevo's free tier supports 100,000 subscribers compared to GetResponse's 500, providing significantly better value for growing businesses without budget.

faq.q: Can I switch from GetResponse to Brevo?
faq.a: Yes, both platforms support contact list exports and imports. Most email marketing tools allow you to export your subscriber lists in CSV format and import them to Brevo. You should plan your email templates and automation flows in advance, as these typically require manual recreation.
